pitch a focused overview that's concise

candidate should include your top

to give a little bit of your personality
and your interest in the opportunity

be customized for different

artificial interviewers don't feel like
they're getting to know the real you
instead I suggest that you outline the
bullet points that you want to cover and
leave room for spontaneity in terms of
exactly how you deliver the points each

as you get comfortable with what you
